Custom Hoodie Manufacturer: Order the Perfect Hoodie From 50 Pieces

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 12 min read
Home / Blog / Custom Hoodie Manufacturer: Order the Perfect Hoodie From 50 Pieces

The hoodie is the most important product in modern apparel. It's the cornerstone of streetwear brands, the signature piece for gym wear labels, and the bestselling item for virtually every clothing startup. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture custom hoodies from 50 pieces per style with complete control over fabric weight, construction, and branding.

Why the Hoodie Is the Most Important Product for a Clothing Brand

Hoodies consistently rank as the #1 bestselling item for independent clothing brands. Here's why: they have the highest perceived value relative to manufacturing cost, they're universally wearable across demographics, they work in every season (layered in winter, worn alone in cooler summer evenings), and premium heavyweight hoodies command retail prices of $60-120 with manufacturing costs of $12-20.

For a startup brand, the hoodie offers the best profit margin and the strongest brand statement. A customer wearing your hoodie becomes a walking billboard for your brand.

Complete Hoodie GSM Guide — Choose the Right Weight

GSM (grams per square meter) determines a hoodie's weight, warmth, and perceived quality. Choosing the right GSM is one of the most important product decisions you'll make:

GSM RangeFeelBest ForPrice Range
220-260 GSMLightweight, casualSummer evenings, promotional, layering$
280-320 GSMStandard, everydayGeneral retail, all-season brands$$
340-380 GSMHeavy, premiumStreetwear, premium positioning$$$
400+ GSMUltra-heavy, luxuryLuxury tier, statement pieces$$$$

Most successful streetwear brands in 2026 use 340-380 GSM for their signature hoodies. This weight signals quality without being uncomfortably heavy.

Hoodie Fabric Options at FABRIOZA

  • French Terry: Smooth face with looped back. 280-340 GSM. Most popular for retail brands — breathable, structured, premium feel.
  • Brushed Fleece: Soft inner brushing for warmth. 300-380 GSM. Best for colder climates and premium positioning.
  • Cotton Pique: Structured texture. 240-280 GSM. Unique aesthetic for differentiation.
  • Performance Polyester Blend: Moisture-wicking, stretch. 260-300 GSM. Ideal for gym/active brands.

Hoodie Customization Options

FABRIOZA offers every major hoodie customization technique:

  • Embroidery: Chest logo, sleeve detail, back design — durable and premium
  • Screen Printing: Standard, discharge, puff print, and cracked effects
  • Heat Transfer: Detailed graphics, full-color designs
  • Sublimation: All-over print on polyester blends — unlimited colors
  • Custom Woven Labels: Your brand sewn into the neckline
  • Printed Care Labels: Compliant with USA/UK/EU/AU regulations
  • Branded Hangtags and Polybags: Complete retail packaging

Hoodie Silhouettes — Choosing the Right Cut

  • Regular Fit: Classic, versatile, widest customer appeal
  • Oversized/Boxy: Dropped shoulders, extended body. Trending in streetwear.
  • Slim/Athletic: Tapered fit. Popular for gym wear brands.
  • Cropped: Shorter body. Women's streetwear and activewear.
  • Zip-Up: Corporate, sports, gym. Versatile layering piece.

Pakistan vs Other Countries for Custom Hoodies

CountryMOQSpecialismDDP?ISO 9001?
Pakistan (FABRIOZA)50 pcsExpertYesYes
China300-500 pcsGood (volume)RarelyVariable
Turkey200+ pcsGood (EU brands)SometimesVariable
Bangladesh500+ pcsMainly wovenNoLimited

Pakistan's Sialkot region has 30+ years of knitwear specialization, making it the ideal location for custom hoodie manufacturing at startup-friendly quantities.

FABRIOZA's Hoodie Manufacturing Process

  1. Inquiry: Share your GSM, fabric, fit, color, and customization requirements
  2. Quote: Detailed pricing within 24 hours
  3. Sample: Physical sample in 7-10 days with your exact specifications
  4. Approval: Review and revise until perfect
  5. Production: 3-4 weeks bulk manufacturing with photo updates
  6. Delivery: Air (5-7 days) or sea (25-35 days) worldwide

Design Your Custom Hoodie Collection With FABRIOZA

Choose your GSM, fabric, fit, and branding — from just 50 pieces. ISO 9001 certified. Free quote in 24 hours.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum order for custom hoodies at FABRIOZA?

50 pieces per style. You can mix sizes (XS-3XL) and up to 3 colors within the 50-piece minimum.

Can I order hoodies in different colors within one order?

Yes, up to 3 colors per style with minimum 15-20 pieces per color.

How heavy should my hoodie be for a premium streetwear brand?

340-380 GSM is the sweet spot for premium streetwear. It signals quality without being uncomfortably heavy. See our full GSM guide.

Can you match a specific Pantone color for my hoodie?

Yes, we work with Pantone color matching. Send us your Pantone code and we'll match it during dyeing.

How long does it take to get custom hoodies made and shipped?

Total timeline is 6-8 weeks: 1 week for quote and setup, 1-2 weeks for sampling, 3-4 weeks for production, 1-2 weeks for shipping.
